title: Feature request: Detect incorrect "assign" to a synchronously assigned "reg" type

features.name: multiple_driver_assign_and_always_ff
features.description: Code should include a continuous assign statement targeting a reg variable that is also driven by a synchronous always @(posedge clk) block with non-blocking assignment

features.name: reg_with_sync_and_combo_drivers
features.description: Code should include a reg variable with both synchronous (always @(posedge clk)) and combinatorial (assign) driver for the same signal
